channel.title: Memory on Ravikanth Chaganti
channel.description: Recent content in Memory on Ravikanth Chaganti

item.title: Context providers and pluggable memory in Microsoft Agent Framework
item.description: In the streaming and multi-turn article, we used AgentSession to give an agent continuity across calls within a single Python process. That works for a CLI script or a one-shot evaluation, but it does not work for an agent that has to remember a returning user tomorrow morning, or for one that needs to recall a fact buried in a conversation from three weeks ago. Both cases require different abstractions: storage that lives outside the process and a way to wire it into the agent without rewriting the agent.
